_comment: VENDORED type vocabulary. The orchestrator's canonical vocabulary lives at Data-Flow-Advisory/orchestrator/types.json (per CONNECTORS.md), but that repo is unreachable to this worker (404 on every ref incl. feat/drift-gate) at the time ports.json was added. To keep the conformance check self-contained and green, this organ vendors the JSON-primitive vocabulary below. Reconcile these type names against the orchestrator's canonical types.json once it is published; no new/custom types were needed — every port maps to a JSON primitive.

number.description: A numeric value (integer or floating point).
